You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is to brew a potion following the potion recipe.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

<thought>**Brewing the Elixir: A Persistent Quest**

Alright, let's get this potion brewing. I've got the recipe memorized, the ingredients mostly in place. Ectoplasm, peach, zulpowand, fairy wand, eye of newt, all sorted. The last step? The spider egg. And, according to my spatial understanding, that little critter is currently residing in the cellar. I've been over this. Now, with the fairy wand in my inventory - and, the glitched, repetitive texts aside - the plan is simple: head to the cellar, grab the egg, backtrack, and dump it in the cauldron. Just need to focus on this and to find the egg!

I've already handled the potion recipe steps - ectoplasm, peach, wiggle the wand, use the fairy wand, and add eye of newt - so this is really the final piece. I should ignore all the repeating text and get the damn egg. I am sure I have enough space.

Let's go, let's go. Cellar, here I come. I just need that spider egg! And, after many re-checks, the only valid command is to do just this.

The instructions are clear - add the spider egg to the cauldron and finish the process. So, even though the text is full of errors, the only path is to the cellar.

The goal is so close to being completed and with the goal in mind I will head back to the cellar.

One last check before I go - I have room for the egg!
